glosses.zh-Hans: 教堂（建筑）; 教会（机构）
glosses.yue: 教堂（建築）; 教會（機構）
glosses.vi: nhà thờ (tòa nhà); Giáo hội (tổ chức)
glosses.ja: 教会（建物）; 教会（組織）

translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đi nhà thờ.
translations.nl: Ik ga vandaag naar de kerk.
translations.hi: मैं आज चर्च जा रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg skal i kirken i dag.
translations.id: Saya pergi ke gereja hari ini.
translations.da: Jeg skal i kirke i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は教会に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; serves as the subject.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st person singular); predicates motion.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, specifying the time of the action.
Preposition 'zu' contracted with the article 'der' (feminine dative singular); governs dative, indicating direction toward a location.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition (dative singular) specifying the destination.

sentences.target: Die Kinder spielen vor der Kirche.

translations.de: Die Kinder spielen vor der Kirche.
translations.en: The children are playing in front of the church.
translations.es: Los niños juegan delante de la iglesia.
translations.it: I bambini giocano davanti alla chiesa.
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺教堂前面玩。
translations.pt: As crianças brincam em frente à igreja.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ chơi trước nhà thờ.
translations.nl: De kinderen spelen voor de kerk.
translations.hu: A gyerekek a templom előtt játszanak.
translations.hi: बच्चे चर्च के सामने खेल रहे हैं।
translations.el: Τα παιδιά παίζουν μπροστά στην εκκλησία.
translations.ro: Copiii se joacă în fața bisericii.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは教会の前で遊んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article functioning as determiner; here nominative plural, marking definiteness of the subject.
Common noun, plural; acts as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense (3rd person plural); denotes the action performed by the subject.
Preposition governing dative in a locational sense; introduces a prepositional phrase of place.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for the noun governed by 'vor'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition (dative), indicating the reference location.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns nachher an der Kirche.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns naːˈheːɐ̯ an deːɐ̯ ˈkɪʁçə/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns nachher an der Kirche.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns naːˈheːɐ̯ an deːɐ̯ ˈkɪʁçə/
translations.en: We'll meet later at the church.
translations.es: Nos vemos más tarde en la iglesia.
translations.fr: On se retrouve plus tard à l’église.
translations.it: Ci vediamo più tardi in chiesa.
translations.pt: Nos encontramos mais tarde na igreja.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau lát nữa ở nhà thờ.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar later bij de kerk.
translations.hi: हम बाद में चर्च के पास मिलेंगे।
translations.ro: Ne vedem mai târziu la biserică.
translations.ja: 後で教会で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st person plural); used reflexively with 'uns' to express reciprocal meeting.
Personal/reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; reflexive object with 'treffen' (sich treffen).
Temporal adverb indicating a time subsequent to the present or another event.
Preposition that can govern dative (location) or accusative (direction); here dative for a stationary location.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for the following noun in the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition (dative), specifying the meeting place.

sentences.target: Meine Oma singt sonntags in der Kirche.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma zɪŋt ˈzɔntaːks ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkɪʁçə/

translations.de: Meine Oma singt sonntags in der Kirche.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma zɪŋt ˈzɔntaːks ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkɪʁçə/
translations.en: My grandma sings in church on Sundays.
translations.es: Mi abuela canta en la iglesia los domingos.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère chante à l’église le dimanche.
translations.it: Mia nonna canta in chiesa la domenica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我奶奶星期天在教堂唱歌。
translations.yue: 我阿嫲星期日喺教堂唱歌。
translations.ru: Моя бабушка по воскресеньям поёт в церкви.
translations.pt: Minha avó canta na igreja aos domingos.
translations.he: סבתא שלי שרה בכנסייה בימי ראשון.
translations.tr: Büyükannem pazar günleri kilisede şarkı söylüyor.
translations.vi: Bà tôi hát ở nhà thờ vào mỗi Chủ nhật.
translations.ar: جدتي تغني في الكنيسة أيام الأحد.
translations.nl: Mijn oma zingt op zondagen in de kerk.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся щонеділі співає в церкві.
translations.hu: A nagymamám vasárnaponként a templomban énekel.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी रविवार को चर्च में गाती हैं।
translations.pl: Moja babcia śpiewa w kościele w niedziele.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου τραγουδάει στην εκκλησία τις Κυριακές.
translations.nb: Bestemor synger i kirken på søndager.
translations.id: Nenek saya bernyanyi di gereja setiap hari Minggu.
translations.sv: Min mormor sjunger i kyrkan på söndagar.
translations.ro: Bunica mea cântă la biserică duminica.
translations.cs: Moje babička zpívá v kostele každou neděli.
translations.da: Min mormor synger i kirken om søndagen.
translations.ja: 祖母は毎週日曜日に教会で歌います。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Oma'.
Common noun, feminine; serves as the subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense (3rd person singular); predicates the action performed by the subject.
Temporal adverb of habitual frequency; indicates regular occurrence on Sundays.
Preposition; with dative to express location inside/within a place.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for the noun in the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition (dative), indicating the location of the action.
